'''shoyachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:lobiform|lobiform]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-y-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lobiform|lobiform]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shoyachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shoyachithi|shoyachithi]] || [[word:shoyachiji|shoyachiji]] || [[word:shoyachishi|shoyachishi]] || [[word:shoyachiki|shoyachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shoyachuthuthu|shoyachuthuthu]] || [[word:shoyachujuju|shoyachujuju]] || [[word:shoyachushushu|shoyachushushu]] || [[word:shoyachukuku|shoyachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shoyachuthu|shoyachuthu]] || [[word:shoyachuju|shoyachuju]] || [[word:shoyachushu|shoyachushu]] || [[word:shoyachuku|shoyachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shoyachufthuf|shoyachufthuf]] || [[word:shoyachufjuf|shoyachufjuf]] || [[word:shoyachufshuf|shoyachufshuf]] || [[word:shoyachufkuf|shoyachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shoyachethe|shoyachethe]] || [[word:shoyacheje|shoyacheje]] || [[word:shoyacheshe|shoyacheshe]] || [[word:shoyacheke|shoyacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shoyachothotho|shoyachothotho]] || [[word:shoyachojojo|shoyachojojo]] || [[word:shoyachoshosho|shoyachoshosho]] || [[word:shoyachokoko|shoyachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shoyachotho|shoyachotho]] || [[word:shoyachojo|shoyachojo]] || [[word:shoyachosho|shoyachosho]] || [[word:shoyachoko|shoyachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shoyachofthof|shoyachofthof]] || [[word:shoyachofjof|shoyachofjof]] || [[word:shoyachofshof|shoyachofshof]] || [[word:shoyachofkof|shoyachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shoyachĂŻfthĂŻf|shoyachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shoyachĂŻfjĂŻf|shoyachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shoyachĂŻfshĂŻf|shoyachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shoyachĂŻfkĂŻf|shoyachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shoyachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|shoyachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shoyachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|shoyachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shoyachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|shoyachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shoyachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|shoyachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shoyachĂŻfthĂŻf|shoyachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shoyachĂŻfjĂŻf|shoyachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shoyachĂŻfshĂŻf|shoyachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shoyachĂŻfkĂŻf|shoyachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shoyachĂŻfthĂŻf|shoyachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shoyachĂŻfjĂŻf|shoyachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shoyachĂŻfshĂŻf|shoyachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shoyachĂŻfkĂŻf|shoyachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shoyachĂŠthĂŠ|shoyachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:shoyachĂŠjĂŠ|shoyachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:shoyachĂŠshĂŠ|shoyachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:shoyachĂŠkĂŠ|shoyachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shoyachathatha|shoyachathatha]] || [[word:shoyachajaja|shoyachajaja]] || [[word:shoyachashasha|shoyachashasha]] || [[word:shoyachakaka|shoyachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shoyachatha|shoyachatha]] || [[word:shoyachaja|shoyachaja]] || [[word:shoyachasha|shoyachasha]] || [[word:shoyachaka|shoyachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shoyachafthaf|shoyachafthaf]] || [[word:shoyachafjaf|shoyachafjaf]] || [[word:shoyachafshaf|shoyachafshaf]] || [[word:shoyachafkaf|shoyachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shoyachasha|shoyachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shoyachshĂ«sha|shoyachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shoyachrosha|shoyachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shoyachmusha|shoyachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shoyachyasha|shoyachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshoyachnkshĂ«sha|goshoyachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshoyachnkrosha|goshoyachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshoyachnkmusha|goshoyachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshoyachnkyasha|goshoyachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shoyayachasha|shoyayachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shoyayachshĂ«sha|shoyayachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shoyayachrosha|shoyayachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shoyayachmusha|shoyayachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shoyayachyasha|shoyayachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshoyayachnkshĂ«sha|goshoyayachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshoyayachnkrosha|goshoyayachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshoyayachnkmusha|goshoyayachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshoyayachnkyasha|goshoyayachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:sheyĂŠchasha|sheyĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sheyĂŠchshĂ«sha|sheyĂŠchshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sheyĂŠchrosha|sheyĂŠchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sheyĂŠchmusha|sheyĂŠchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sheyĂŠchyasha|sheyĂŠchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosheyĂŠchnkshĂ«sha|gosheyĂŠchnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosheyĂŠchnkrosha|gosheyĂŠchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosheyĂŠchnkmusha|gosheyĂŠchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosheyĂŠchnkyasha|gosheyĂŠchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shoyfachasha|shoyfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shoyfachshĂ«sha|shoyfachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shoyfachrosha|shoyfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shoyfachmusha|shoyfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shoyfachyasha|shoyfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshoyfachnkshĂ«sha|goshoyfachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshoyfachnkrosha|goshoyfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshoyfachnkmusha|goshoyfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshoyfachnkyasha|goshoyfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
